cursos.metaDescription: Free interactive courses to learn web development.
cursos.catalogSubtitle: Interactive courses with automatic grading on your computer. Build your portfolio step by step.
cursos.reactCardDescription: 30 levels. Build your personal portfolio with local Playwright checks.
cursos.reactMetaDescription: Free interactive React course. 30 levels, diploma at the end.
cursos.featureLevelsDesc: Build your portfolio step by step, from basics to publishing online.
cursos.featureCheckDesc: Your progress is validated on your computer as you code the project.
cursos.level1DownloadHint: Download the empty starter project, install it, and start with the first checkpoint.
cursos.downloadAtLevelHint: Download the project as it should look after finishing level {level} (after the previous level). Replace your folder or copy src/ on top.
cursos.autoSyncHint: With npm run dev running, steps update on the web each time you save in src/.
cursos.terminalSetupTitle: From the project terminal, run this
cursos.terminalSetupIntro: Open the zip folder → terminal. Copy and paste these two commands (one after the other):
cursos.terminalNpmHint: If you don't have Node: install from nodejs.org (LTS) and reopen the terminal.
cursos.terminalAutoCheckNote: npm run dev checks your code automatically on save. No need to run check manually.
cursos.previewLevelEndTitle: This is how your site should look when you finish this level
cursos.profileHint: This name will appear on your certificate when you complete all 30 levels.
cursos.supabaseNotConfigured: Server does not have Supabase configured yet.
cursos.diplomaLocked: Complete all 30 levels to unlock your diploma.

skills.title: SKILLS
skills.tagline: A comprehensive overview of my technical skills and proficiency levels.

c_cpp.name: C / C++
c_cpp.description: Used extensively in game development with Unreal Engine for multiplayer networking, gameplay systems, and performance-critical code. Also applied in microcontroller programming for the Tire Inflator Simulator project.

java.name: Java
java.description: Applied in university coursework for object-oriented programming, data structures, and software design patterns. Built desktop applications and backend systems.

python.name: Python
python.description: Core language for the StudyAgents AI platform — FastAPI backend, LangChain integrations, and data processing. Also used for scripting, automation, and ML/NLP experiments.

sql.name: SQL
sql.description: Database design and queries for web applications and backend systems. Used PostgreSQL and MySQL for relational data modeling, optimizations, and reporting.

r.name: R
r.description: Statistical analysis and data visualization in academic projects. Used for exploratory data analysis, regression models, and generating publication-ready plots.

html_css.name: HTML / CSS
html_css.description: Building responsive, accessible web interfaces. Used across portfolio, StudyAgents, and other projects with modern CSS (Flexbox, Grid, animations) and semantic HTML.

react_nextjs.name: React / Next.js
react_nextjs.description: Main stack for web development — this portfolio, StudyAgents frontend, and several personal projects. Experience with hooks, SSR, API routes, and component architecture.

tailwindcss.name: TailwindCSS
tailwindcss.description: Utility-first CSS for rapid UI development. Used in portfolio, StudyAgents, and other Next.js projects for consistent styling and responsive design.

nodejs.name: Node.js
nodejs.description: Server-side JavaScript for APIs and tooling. Used with FastAPI (Python) in StudyAgents for real-time features and with Next.js API routes.

postgresql.name: PostgreSQL
postgresql.description: Relational database for persistent storage in web applications. Schema design, migrations, and query optimization for user data and analytics.

mongodb.name: MongoDB
mongodb.description: Document-based storage for flexible data models. Used in projects requiring schema flexibility and quick iteration.

llm.name: LLM
llm.description: Large Language Models power the StudyAgents assistant — summarization, Q&A, and test generation. Integrated OpenAI and local models via LangChain.

rag.name: RAG
rag.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation in StudyAgents: ChromaDB vector store, document chunking, and semantic search to ground AI responses in uploaded PDFs.

nlp.name: NLP
nlp.description: Natural language processing for text extraction, summarization, and question-answering. Applied in StudyAgents and academic experiments.

neural_networks.name: Neural Networks
neural_networks.description: Understanding of architectures and training. Applied in course projects and for interpreting LLM behavior in StudyAgents.

exp.name: ExP
exp.description: Explanation-based learning concepts applied to making AI outputs interpretable and educational in the StudyAgents context.

autonomous_agents.name: Autonomous Agents
autonomous_agents.description: StudyAgents uses agentic patterns — tool use, planning, and multi-step reasoning for study assistance, document processing, and test generation.

unreal_engine.name: Unreal Engine
unreal_engine.description: Primary engine for game projects: Salmon Infinite (online multiplayer shooter), DROVO, Circus VR, and VR Experience. C++, Blueprints, networking, and 3D pipeline.

unity.name: Unity
unity.description: FIB Lab 2D game and prototyping. Experience with C#, 2D systems, and cross-platform builds.

blender.name: Blender
blender.description: 3D modeling, texturing, and animation for games and 3D printing. Character props, environment assets, and UV unwrapping.

photoshop.name: Photoshop
photoshop.description: Textures, UI assets, and promotional art for games and portfolio. Photo editing and 2D asset creation.

substance.name: Substance
substance.description: Substance Painter for PBR materials and texturing game assets. Realistic surfaces for characters and environments.

after_effects.name: After Effects
after_effects.description: Motion graphics and video editing for game trailers and portfolio presentations.

git.name: Git
git.description: Version control for all projects — branching, rebasing, and collaborative workflows. Essential for solo and team development.

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Agile project management — sprints, backlogs, and issue tracking in team environments.

trello.name: Trello
trello.description: Task boards for personal and small-team project organization. Kanban-style workflow.

3d_printing.name: 3D Printing
3d_printing.description: FDM printing with UltiMaker Cura — large-scale models, support optimization, and post-processing. Adapted complex 3D models for printing.

proteus.name: Proteus
proteus.description: Microcontroller simulation for the Tire Inflator project. Circuit design and C programming for embedded systems.

computer_systems.name: Computer Systems
computer_systems.description: Understanding of operating systems, networking, and low-level concepts. Applied in game networking and systems programming.

client_server_architecture.name: Client-server architecture (mobile app + REST API)
client_server_architecture.description: Designing solutions with clear separation between mobile client and REST backend, with scalable API contracts.

layered_backend_design.name: Layered backend design (routes/controllers/services/models)
layered_backend_design.description: Structuring backend code by responsibility to improve maintainability, testability, and business-logic reuse.

react_native_expo_router.name: React Native + Expo (Expo Router)
react_native_expo_router.description: Mobile development with route-based navigation, modular app structure, and fast iteration using Expo.

typescript_frontend.name: TypeScript on frontend
typescript_frontend.description: Static typing for UI and application logic to reduce runtime errors and improve long-term maintainability.

google_oauth2.name: Google OAuth 2.0 integration
google_oauth2.description: Implementing secure social login with Google OAuth flows and identity handling across frontend/backend.

jwt_sessions.name: Session/token management with JWT
jwt_sessions.description: Authentication with access/refresh tokens, expiration control, and protection of private routes.

stripe_payments_webhooks.name: Stripe payments (including webhooks)
stripe_payments_webhooks.description: Stripe Checkout integration plus reliable payment event synchronization through signed webhooks.

aws_lambda_serverless.name: AWS Lambda (serverless)
aws_lambda_serverless.description: Running backend logic without server management, with auto-scaling and pay-per-use cost model.

aws_cloud.name: AWS Cloud (Lambda, S3, and more)
aws_cloud.description: Using AWS cloud services for backend and storage, including Lambda, S3, and other integrations based on project needs.

aws_s3_storage.name: AWS S3 file storage
aws_s3_storage.description: Cloud file storage with bucket strategy, signed URLs, and access control.

postgresql_database_design.name: PostgreSQL design and usage
postgresql_database_design.description: Relational modeling, performant SQL querying, and indexing for production workloads.

sql_schema_migrations.name: SQL schema migrations (script-based)
sql_schema_migrations.description: Schema versioning with reproducible migration scripts, controlled rollbacks, and traceability.

backend_testing_jest_supertest.name: Backend testing with Jest + Supertest
backend_testing_jest_supertest.description: Integration testing for REST endpoints covering contracts, failure cases, and core business scenarios.

github_actions_ci.name: GitHub Actions CI
github_actions_ci.description: Automated lint, type-check, and test pipelines on push/PR to enforce continuous quality.

github_actions_cd.name: GitHub Actions CD
github_actions_cd.description: Automated cloud deployments with traceable workflows and environment-aware safeguards.

backend_dockerization.name: Backend service containerization with Docker
backend_dockerization.description: Packaging backend services in containers for consistent execution across local, CI, and production.

external_api_consumption_axios.name: External API consumption (HTTP/axios)
external_api_consumption_axios.description: Robust HTTP integrations with error handling, timeouts, retries, and response normalization.

geospatial_features.name: Geospatial features (maps, routes, autonomy)
geospatial_features.description: Implementing map-based features, route calculations, and location-aware product logic.

env_vars_multienvironment_config.name: Environment variables and multi-environment config
env_vars_multienvironment_config.description: Configuration management across dev/staging/prod plus secure handling of secrets.

linting_type_checking.name: Linting and type checking (ESLint + TS)
linting_type_checking.description: Automated code-quality rules and static type validation to reduce technical debt.

git_workflows_pipeline_automation.name: Git workflows and pipeline automation
git_workflows_pipeline_automation.description: Branching, pull-request workflows, and CI/CD automation for efficient team collaboration.

experience.title: EXPERIENCE
experience.tagline: My professional path in software development and technology.

owius.title: Software development internship
owius.summary:
Full-stack web development since November: data-heavy products, e-commerce with payments, admin tooling, WordPress, and an in-progress SaaS to build virtual escape rooms.

Typical stack: React, React Native, Node, Redsys, cron jobs, SEO, i18n, and performance tuning.

workBlocks.title: E-commerce + operations console
points: Joined a large ongoing project; now live in production.
Daily automated scraping (cron) on a 100k+ row dataset.
Grouping, filtering, and dropping rows based on business rules.
Checkout with Redsys plus bank transfer invoicing (PDF).
CRM-style backoffice for catalog, orders, and internal ops.

workBlocks.title: Corporate site
points: Short engagement (~3 days): fixes, tweaks, and small features.

workBlocks.title: Virtual escape room
points: Moved from hard-coded content to an editable flow—no redeploy for copy changes.
Screens, question banks, and quizzes managed from the backoffice.

workBlocks.title: WordPress
points: Responsive layout on an existing theme.
Updates to a custom PHP widget.

workBlocks.title: SaaS — escape room builder (current)
points: Greenfield product: slide-style interactive editor (pages, buttons, quizzes, images, video).
Customer portal with monthly billing: Redsys, recurring charges with tokenization and security hardening.
Separate player web app: join with a room code.

experience.yearsFootnote: * Internship in progress; end date may align with academic or contract terms.
